# Sensor Reader

URL: https://sensor-reader.pages.dev/

Sensor Reader is a mobile-first browser sensor web app. It reads motion, orientation, compass, geolocation, and wake lock APIs, then displays raw and smoothed values plus focused compass, level, and map widgets.

## Technical Summary

- Frontend: React + Vite.
- Hosting: Cloudflare Pages.
- Sensor APIs: DeviceMotionEvent, DeviceOrientationEvent, Geolocation API, Screen Wake Lock API.
- Processing: time-based EMA, circular EMA for heading/yaw, soft deadband, optional sample throttling, display throttling.
- Widgets: compass, level, MapLibre GPS map.

## Entry Points

- App: https://sensor-reader.pages.dev/
- AI summary: https://sensor-reader.pages.dev/llms.txt
